title: St Mary's Church, Vendore
tagline: St Mary's Church, Vendore — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: St Mary's Church, Vendore is a much-loved spiritual town in Kerala, known for temples and pilgrimage.
overview.description: St. Mary's Church (Malayalam: സെന്റ് മേരീസ്‌ പള്ളി) is a Syro-Malabar Catholic church in Vendore, Thrissur district, Kerala, India. It is known for its patronage of lady Mother Mary and is part of the Archdiocese of Thrissur. Vendore Parish is also known by the name Vendore Amma (Malayalam: വെണ്ടോരമ്മ), comes under the jurisdiction of Pudukkad Forona, and is located between Amballur and Mannampetta 200 m from Vendore Junction.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Vendore
topPlaces.description: Vendore is situated in Amballur village in the Thrissur district of Kerala, India. Vendore is situated in between Amballur and Mannampetta.

topPlaces.name: Alagappa Nagar
topPlaces.description: Alagappa Nagar is situated at Amballur Village near Puthukkad town in Mukundapuram Taluk in Thrissur District in Kerala State. Alagappa Nagar is 12.7 km far from Thrissur city.

topPlaces.name: Nenmanikkara
topPlaces.description: Nenmanikkara is a census town in Thrissur district in the Indian state of Kerala. It lies nearer to NH544 near Amballur town.

topPlaces.name: Puthukkad
topPlaces.description: Puthukkad is a town on the banks of Kurumali River, also known as Mupliyam River, in Kerala. The town is 15 km (9.3 mi) to the south of Thrissur city, 16 km (9.9 mi) to the north of Chalakudy, and 1.2 km (0.75 mi) west of Cheruval.

topPlaces.name: Amballur, Thrissur
topPlaces.description: Amballur is a village near Pudukkad town in Thrissur district in Kerala. National Highway NH544 passes through this place.

topPlaces.name: Jerusalem Retreat Center
topPlaces.description: Jerusalem Retreat Center is a Catholic charismatic renewal centre in Thalore, Thrissur city. The centre is managed by the Carmelites of Mary Immaculate, Thrissur.

topPlaces.name: Trikkur Mahadeva Temple
topPlaces.description: Trikkur Mahadeva Temple is a rock-cut cave temple in Trikkur village in Thrissur District in Kerala believed to have been built in the 7th or 8th century. Being a cave temple, Buddhist and Jain monks used the site to meditate alongside the Hindu monks.

topPlaces.name: Parappukkara
topPlaces.description: Parappukkara is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St Mary's Church, Vendore?
faq.a: The best time to visit St Mary's Church, Vendore is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St Mary's Church, Vendore?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (34 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (52 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St Mary's Church, Vendore?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St Mary's Church, Vendore at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St Mary's Church, Vendore?
faq.a: Stays in St Mary's Church, Vendore start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St Mary's Church, Vendore?
faq.a: The top attractions are Vendore, Alagappa Nagar, Nenmanikkara, Puthukkad, Amballur, Thrissur.
